metcon.name: Warm up
metcon.description:
2 rounds easy:
100m jog
8 air squats
8 scap pull-ups or active hangs
8 PVC/banded pass-throughs
5 hang muscle cleans
5 hang power cleans
5 clean pulls
5 cleans
Swap partners
5 strict press
5 push press
5 push jerk
5 kip swings
4 T2B / leg raises
6 box step-overs or jump overs

hypertrophy.reasoning: Clean/press/T2B heavily tax quads, anterior delts, core, triceps; accessory work targets opposing and neglected muscles.
suggested_exercises: Seal rows or machine rows: 3 x 10
Single-leg glute bridges: 3 x 8 each leg

raw_text:
Partner workout | 35 min AMRAP
400m run together
16 clean & jerks
12 synchro toes-to-bar or leg raises
24 box jump overs / box step overs
@61/43kg
Warm up | 2 rounds easy:
100m jog
8 air squats
8 scap pull-ups or active hangs
8 PVC/banded pass-throughs
5 hang muscle cleans
5 hang power cleans
5 clean pulls
5 cleans
Swap partners
5 strict press
5 push press
5 push jerk
5 kip swings
4 T2B / leg raises
6 box step-overs or jump overs
siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: Warm up. Workout: 100m jog, 8 air squats, 8 PVC/banded pass-throughs, 5 hang muscle cleans, 5 hang power cleans. For hypertrophy, focus on rear delts, biceps, back (upper/mid).
